languages.text: "Как я и говорил, это приобретенный вкус. Позвольте вас осмотреть после купания".
"As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."
languages.original_text: "Как я и говорил, это приобретенный вкус. Позвольте вас осмотреть после купания".

traits.locale_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."
"As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."
"As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

languages.text: «Como le he dicho, es un gusto adquirido. Permítame que le examine cuando haya terminado de bañarse».
languages.original_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

traits.locale_text: «Como le he dicho, es un gusto adquirido. Permítame que le examine cuando haya terminado de bañarse».

languages.text: “如我之前所说，这味道要慢慢习惯。等您沐浴完毕，我再给您检查一下。”
languages.original_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

traits.locale_text: “如我之前所说，这味道要慢慢习惯。等您沐浴完毕，我再给您检查一下。”

languages.text: « Comme je le disais, il faut s'y habituer. Permettez-moi de vous examiner après votre bain. »
languages.original_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

traits.locale_text: « Comme je le disais, il faut s'y habituer. Permettez-moi de vous examiner après votre bain. »

languages.text: "Dediğim gibi... Alışılması gereken bir tat. Banyodan sonra sizi muayene etmeme müsaade edin."
languages.original_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

traits.locale_text: "Dediğim gibi... Alışılması gereken bir tat. Banyodan sonra sizi muayene etmeme müsaade edin."

languages.text: 「申し上げた通り、慣れを要する味です。入浴の後、診察させてください」
languages.original_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

traits.locale_text: 「申し上げた通り、慣れを要する味です。入浴の後、診察させてください」

languages.text: "Wie gesagt, etwas für Kenner. Ich werde Euch nach dem Bad untersuchen."
languages.original_text: "As I said, it is an acquired taste. Let me examine you after your bath."

traits.locale_text: "Wie gesagt, etwas für Kenner. Ich werde Euch nach dem Bad untersuchen."
